---
title: "Documentations"
toc: false
---

## Core Documentation

This section is for project documentation files such as:

- Study proposal
- Statistical analysis plan (SAP)
- Protocol amendments and version notes

## Current Status

- Proposal: [View proposal](proposal.qmd)
- Longitudinal Linkage (trajectory modelling + psychometric calibration + dataset integration): [View documentation](longitudinal_linkage.qmd)
- Secondary Data Analysis Plan / SAP: [View plan](secondary_data_analysis_plan.qmd)

## Notes

Use this page as the central documentation index for CO-LUMINATE.
